news.t: PGIM Investments Launches Growth, Value and Multi-Asset ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PJFV is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 6.60%, Alphabet at 5.28%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.43%, NiSource at 4.27%, and Applied Materials at 3.82%.

overview.description: The PGIM Jennison Focused Value ETF (PJFV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to a narrow basket of value stocks that from all over the world. PJFV was launched on Dec 12, 2022 and is issued by PGIM.

data.title: PGIM Investments Launches Growth, Value and Multi-Asset ETFs
data.text: NEWARK, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PGIM Investments has launched three actively managed ETFs — the PGIM Jennison Focused Growth ETF (PJFG), the PGIM Jennison Focused Value ETF (PJFV) and the PGIM Portfo...
